architecture.summary: KnowAgent augments LLM-based agents with an action knowledge base and self-learning mechanism to constrain planning trajectories. The system intercepts the LLM's action generation during multi-step reasoning over environments (HotpotQA, ALFWorld), filtering or steering candidate actions against explicit action knowledge to reduce hallucination and guide trajectory synthesis. Information flows from external action KB into the planning loop as soft constraints on token selection or action validity.
trained_components: self-learning strategy for action knowledge refinement

biblio.title: KnowAgent: Knowledge-Augmented Planning for LLM-Based Agents

claims.statement: KNOWAGENT can achieve comparable or superior performance to existing baselines on HotpotQA and ALFWorld
KNOWAGENT is effective in terms of planning hallucinations mitigation
LLM agents fall short on sophisticated challenges when interacting with environments through generating executable actions due to lack of built-in action knowledge
